features: Strong and durable: bamboo is naturally strong and durable, unlike the paper rod, does not break easily. Soft and durable cotton heads ensure comfortable ear sticks use.

High-quality material: the cotton bud is made of bamboo. Ear sticks are flexibility, toughness and durability, not easy to break and deformation. Uniform thickness, moderate length, smooth and burr-free, no smell, safe and comfortable.

High-quality cotton: Our bamboo cotton buds are made of high-quality, absorbent cotton, fluffy and soft, comfortable to touch and do not irritate the skin. The double cotton heads are dense and not easy to fall off, and have strong adsorption, which can better clean the stains.

Environmentally friendly: our bamboo cotton buds are made from sustainable bamboo and organic cotton, they are cotton buds natural, recyclable, biodegradable and environmentally friendly. Our products are designed to create a cleaner, better world.
Versatile: Our bamboo cotton buds can be used to clean and dry baby ears, apply and remove makeup, clean various small items and keyboards in the home.
